notableEvents.label: Ramón Urías reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Ramón Urías reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Javier Sanoja.

notableEvents.label: José Fermín GIDP
notableEvents.detail: José Fermín grounds into a double play, second baseman Leo Jiménez to first baseman Liam Hicks. Ramón Urías out at 2nd. José Fermín out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Graham Pauley reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by first baseman Ramón Urías. Heriberto Hernández to 2nd. Heriberto Hernández advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by first baseman Ramón Urías.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Ramón Urías reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Javier Sanoja.

notableEvents.label: Leo Jiménez plunked
notableEvents.detail: Leo Jiménez hit by pitch. Heriberto Hernández to 3rd. Owen Caissie to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Xavier Edwards GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Xavier Edwards grounds into a double play, shortstop Thomas Saggese to first baseman Ramón Urías. Javier Sanoja out at 2nd. Xavier Edwards out at 1st.
